text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The start of summer camp has finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's been a while since we last came here...
choice_data_list:
Should we start on a high note and get some
food?

Should we start on a high note and get some
food?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, not yet. Let me put away my bags, then we
can jump straight into training.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Both my rivals, Creek and Tama, are waiting for
me... I need to get stronger so I can go toe-to-toe
with them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's save the eating for when we're done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, our summer camp is off to a heated
start.
